hooks.command: if ! command -v gitleaks &> /dev/null; then echo 'gitleaks not found, skipping secret scan'; exit 0; fi; OUTPUT=$(gitleaks git --no-banner "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT" >&2; printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Push blocked: gitleaks detected secrets. Review findings and remove them before pushing."}'; exit 2; fi
